user.title: Create chore list
user.description: Enter a name for this chore list.

data_description.list_name: Name for this chore list (e.g. "Daily Chores")

reconfigure.title: Rename chore list
reconfigure.description: Update the name of this chore list.

data_description.list_name: New name for this chore list

abort.already_configured: A chore list with this name already exists.

interval.name: Repeat interval
interval.description: Every N units (2 with weekly = every other week).

byday.name: Weekdays
byday.description: Days of the week. Monthly/yearly rules also take an ordinal prefix as a custom value ('-1fri' = last Friday).

bymonthday.name: Days of the month
bymonthday.description: E.g. 15, or -1 for the last day. Monthly/yearly only.

bysetpos.name: Weekday position
bysetpos.description: Nth match of the weekdays within the month (-1 = last). Requires weekdays; monthly/yearly only.

dtstart.name: Start
dtstart.description: Time of day ('08:00:00'), or a full datetime to set the phase when the repeat interval is above 1. Omit to keep the current start.

until.name: End on
until.description: Last day or datetime of the series. Mutually exclusive with 'End after'.

count.name: End after
count.description: Total occurrences. Mutually exclusive with 'End on'.

persist.name: Keep after series ends
persist.description: Keep the expired chore in storage (re-enterable via update_item) instead of sweeping it with hidden completed items.

frequency.name: Repeat
frequency.description: Minutely, hourly, daily, weekly, monthly, or yearly.

interval.name: Repeat interval
interval.description: Due this many units after the last completion (3 with monthly = after 3 months).

bymonth.name: Months
bymonth.description: Season window — the interval clock only runs in these months.

until.name: End on
until.description: The series ends once the next due passes this. Mutually exclusive with 'End after'.

count.name: End after
count.description: Total completions. Mutually exclusive with 'End on'.

persist.name: Keep after series ends
persist.description: Keep the expired chore in storage (re-enterable via update_item) instead of sweeping it with hidden completed items.

due_datetime.name: Due datetime
due_datetime.description: When this chore is due. Omit to create an unscheduled chore that can be rescheduled later.

persist.name: Persist after completion
persist.description: When false (default), the chore is deleted on the next hide_completed_items / todo.remove_completed_items call. When true, the chore stays in storage so it can be reactivated via update_item.

create_item.name: Create item
create_item.description: Add a new chore to a chore list. Provide one of 'Scheduled', 'Interval', or 'Oneshot' configuration.

entity_id.name: Entity
entity_id.description: The calendar entity for the target chore list.

description.name: Description
description.description: Optional detail text, shown on the chore's calendar events.

trigger_entity.name: Trigger entity
trigger_entity.description: Entity that triggers completion (e.g. an NFC tag).

assigned_to.name: Assigned to
assigned_to.description: Person entities assigned to this chore.

scheduled.name: Scheduled
scheduled.description: A chore that repeats on a calendar grid.

interval.name: Interval
interval.description: A chore due a fixed period after its last completion.

oneshot.name: Oneshot
oneshot.description: Configure a non-recurring chore with a specific due datetime (or no date for an unscheduled item).

pending_period.name: Pending period
pending_period.description: How long before the due time the chore reads as pending (upcoming, completable early). Default: 3 hours.

grace_period.name: Grace period
grace_period.description: How long after the due time before the chore is considered overdue. Default: 1 hour.

update_item.name: Update item
update_item.description: Update an existing chore in a chore list.

entity_id.name: Entity
entity_id.description: A chore sensor entity or the calendar entity for the target list.

item.name: Item name or UID
item.description: Required when targeting the calendar entity; inferred when targeting a chore sensor.

chore_name.name: Chore name
chore_name.description: New display name for the chore.

description.name: Description
description.description: New detail text. Provide an empty value to clear it.

assigned_to.name: Assigned to
assigned_to.description: Person entities assigned to this chore.

scheduled.name: Scheduled
scheduled.description: Replace the repeat rule ('Repeat' required), or pass only start/keep fields to leave the rule unchanged.

oneshot.name: Oneshot
oneshot.description: Update a oneshot chore's due datetime. Set due datetime to null to clear it.

pending_period.name: Pending period
pending_period.description: How long before the due time the chore reads as pending.

grace_period.name: Grace period
grace_period.description: How long after the due time before the chore is considered overdue.

delete_item.name: Delete item
delete_item.description: Remove a chore from a chore list.

entity_id.name: Entity
entity_id.description: A chore sensor entity or the calendar entity for the target list.

item.name: Item name or UID
item.description: Required when targeting the calendar entity; inferred when targeting a chore sensor.

entity_id.name: Entity
entity_id.description: A chore sensor entity or the calendar entity for the target list.

item.name: Item name or UID
item.description: Required when targeting the calendar entity; inferred when targeting a chore sensor.

completed_by.name: Completed by
completed_by.description: Person entity who completed the chore.

completed_at.name: Completed at
completed_at.description: Datetime of completion. Defaults to now.

keep_skip.name: Keep skip
keep_skip.description: Preserve any active skip instead of clearing it. Useful when completing early but still wanting the deferral to hold.

skip_item.name: Skip item
skip_item.description: Defer a chore's next occurrence without recording a completion.

entity_id.name: Entity
entity_id.description: A chore sensor entity or the calendar entity for the target list.

item.name: Item name or UID
item.description: Required when targeting the calendar entity; inferred when targeting a chore sensor.

range.name: Range
range.description: 'This occurrence' skips just the targeted occurrence (scheduled default; not valid for interval chores). 'This and future' slides the whole series forward (interval default; a bare 'Until' implies it).

recurrence_id.name: Occurrence
recurrence_id.description: Identifies the occurrence to skip with 'This occurrence', in the form calendar events carry (e.g. 20260615T080000). Omit to skip the next upcoming one.

until.name: Until
until.description: Datetime to defer the chore until, with 'This and future'. Omit to use the type-specific default: next occurrence for scheduled chores, now + interval for interval chores, or clear the due date for oneshot chores.

uncomplete_item.name: Uncomplete item
uncomplete_item.description: Revert the most recent completion of a chore.

entity_id.name: Entity
entity_id.description: A chore sensor entity or the calendar entity for the target list.

item.name: Item name or UID
item.description: Required when targeting the calendar entity; inferred when targeting a chore sensor.

hide_completed_items.name: Hide completed items
hide_completed_items.description: Set the per-list cutoff for hiding completed items from the calendar and todo entities. Items completed before the cutoff are hidden but their last_completed timestamps are preserved for state computation. Terminal-completed oneshot chores with persist=false are deleted from storage during this call.

entity_id.name: Entity
entity_id.description: The calendar entity for the target chore list.

before.name: Before
before.description: Hide items completed before this datetime. Mutually exclusive with 'keep_for'. Omit both for cutoff = now.

keep_for.name: Keep for
keep_for.description: Keep items completed within this duration of now (e.g. 24 hours). Mutually exclusive with 'before'. Omit both for cutoff = now.

get_items.name: Get items
get_items.description: Retrieve chores from a chore list with their current status.

entity_id.name: Entity
entity_id.description: The calendar entity for the target chore list.

status.name: Status filter
status.description: Only return chores with this status.
